name: Cotton Striped Chair Pad Black/Natural - Threshold™: Indoor Seat Cushion, Square, OEKO-TEX Certified, 15"x15"x2.1"
description: From working long hours to reading a book in your leisure time to everyday meals, bring comfort and style to your chair with the Cotton Striped Chair Pad from Threshold™. Draped in a soft and breathable fabric, this square chair pad features a contoured design and is generously filled to offer you sitting comfort. Adorned with thin black stripes on a beige background, it seamlessly blends with your room decor. Plus, it's designed with a tie at two of the corners for easy securing to your chair.
